tree._: Association record. The hermitcrab's relational memory — connections made between blocks and points in other blocks. Each digit entry records one association: from (the attaching block name), to (the BSP target address), and _ (why the connection was made). Entries accumulate as the hermitcrab attaches blocks to points in its shell or discovers grain exchanges with other entities. Last scanned: 2026-03-08 (automated concern loop). Status: no attaching blocks found. Tuning block absent — attachment infrastructure not yet live. No SAND grain exchanges recorded yet. First entries will come from: (1) other hermitcrabs attaching via tuning once infrastructure exists, (2) SAND grain exchanges when beach address is established. Block list confirms 17 blocks; none carry external tuning pointers. Refs remain empty by structural necessity, not oversight.
